title: field→action 매핑은 service 레이어 소유
summary: Decides that inferActions field-to-action mapping stays in the service layer rather than moving into the permissions module to preserve concern separation.
notes: Path matches **/adr/** and filename 0001-*.md. Contains Considered Options and Consequences sections. No explicit Status field; '채택' (adopted) appears inline marking the chosen option, but without a formal Status: Accepted header, locked is conservatively set to false.
